🐬

{{ .Title }}

{{ i18n "install" }} {{ i18n "config" }} GitHub

{{ if eq .Site.Language.Lang "zh" }}多终端接入{{ else }}Multi-Transport{{ end }}

{{ if eq .Site.Language.Lang "zh" }}终端、SSH、邮件、MQTT — 同一 Agent，任意入口。{{ else }}Terminal, SSH, email, MQTT — one agent through any door.{{ end }}

{{ if eq .Site.Language.Lang "zh" }}工具丰富{{ else }}Rich Toolset{{ end }}

{{ if eq .Site.Language.Lang "zh" }}Shell 命令、浏览器自动化、MCP 工具、Webhook，扩展无限制。{{ else }}Shell commands, browser automation, MCP tools, webhooks — extensible.{{ end }}

{{ if eq .Site.Language.Lang "zh" }}多 Agent 协作{{ else }}Multi-Agent{{ end }}

{{ if eq .Site.Language.Lang "zh" }}调度子 Agent 并行执行任务，代码审查、安全审计一键并发。{{ else }}Dispatch sub-agents in parallel for code review, security audit, and more.{{ end }}

{{ if eq .Site.Language.Lang "zh" }}技能系统{{ else }}Skill System{{ end }}

{{ if eq .Site.Language.Lang "zh" }}Markdown 即技能 — 按需加载，保持 prompt 简洁。{{ else }}Markdown files that teach — load on demand, keep prompt lean.{{ end }}

{{ if eq .Site.Language.Lang "zh" }}定时任务{{ else }}Scheduled Tasks{{ end }}

{{ if eq .Site.Language.Lang "zh" }}CRONTAB.md — 用 cron 语法定义日常维护任务。{{ else }}CRONTAB.md — define recurring tasks in cron syntax.{{ end }}

{{ if eq .Site.Language.Lang "zh" }}会话持久化{{ else }}Session Persistence{{ end }}

{{ if eq .Site.Language.Lang "zh" }}自动检查点、摘要、日志，Agent 状态不丢失。{{ else }}Checkpoints, summaries, diary — agent state never lost.{{ end }}
